description_long: This is a pair of round, full-rim glasses with a distinctive and unconventional design. The frame is thick and robust, featuring a double bridge structure that connects the two circular lenses. The lenses themselves are tinted with a gradient effect, shifting from purple to blue and pink hues, and one lens appears to have a mirrored or reflective finish. Attached to the left side of the frame is a geometric, angular extension in a solid purple color, while the right side features a similar but more elongated and conical attachment. The temples are thin, black, and slightly curved, contrasting with the boldness of the front frame and side attachments. The overall appearance is avant-garde, suggesting a fashion-forward or possibly costume-oriented accessory.
description: A pair of round, full-rim glasses with thick frames, gradient purple-pink lenses, and bold geometric side attachments. The temples are thin and black, contrasting with the striking front design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the round lenses, thick double bridge, and the prominent purple geometric attachment on the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular purple extension and the layered, sculptural detail on the left lens area.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the circular backs of the lenses, the double bridge, and the symmetry of the side attachments.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the elongated, conical purple attachment and the thin, curved temples.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is round with a full-rim structure, featuring a thick, robust build and a double bridge. The design is bold and geometric, with large, angular side attachments that extend outward from each lens, giving the glasses a sculptural and avant-garde appearance.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses have a gradient tint, shifting from purple to blue and pink, with one lens exhibiting a mirrored or reflective effect. The tint is semi-transparent, allowing some visibility through the lenses.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a double-bar design, straight and solid, connecting the two lenses with a prominent, architectural look. There are no visible nose pads or additional support structures.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin, black, and slightly curved, with a smooth finish and no visible engravings or embellishments. Their minimalist style contrasts with the boldness of the front frame and side attachments.
